user.title: Event Countdown
user.description: Click Submit to install. Manage events by clicking **Configure** on the integration.

data_description.event_date: For birthdays and anniversaries: use the birth/wedding date. For one-time events: use the event date.
data_description.soon: The event will be highlighted when this many days remain.
data_description.picture: Optional. Path to a local image, e.g. /local/pic/name.jpg
data_description.recurring: On = repeats every year (birthdays, anniversaries). Off = skipped once the date has passed.
data_description.disabled: On = this event is ignored until re-enabled.

delete_event.title: Delete event
delete_event.description: Select the event to permanently delete. This cannot be undone.
